TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Dawu, title = Dawu, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Dawu} }

S.FORM: Dawu mki sku Taitung. su'unun kwara glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 62.59 km² (rhyan rinpang glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 5.7 km², rr'an hyan glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 43.47 km²), 4,435 hi ku su'unun kwara alang hi kya, 1,781 buwan ku kwarakya, tiku sahuy na alang Gyencumin ga 3,151 hi, kyala kwara pinspung s'uli ga 71%. kwara sahuy na alang Gyencumin ga Taywang Gyencumin na Paywan ku smrrhu ku pyux s'uli taya kya. ays ptyaw sebu Dawu ays psgayun 5 ru 10 alang. 10 alang hani ga, Pangwi , Qaljapang , Ru ja qas , Pacavalj , Ku shu shu , Qu chn.la love vn , Tjacupu , Tjukuvulj , Seqeciin , Seqalapit .

Dawu mki sku Taitung. su'unun kwara glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 62.59 km² (rhyan rinpang glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 5.7 km², rr'an hyan glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 43.47 km²), 4,435 hi ku su'unun kwara alang hi kya, 1,781 buwan ku kwarakya, tiku sahuy na alang Gyencumin ga 3,151 hi, kyala kwara pinspung s'uli ga 71%. kwara sahuy na alang Gyencumin ga Taywang Gyencumin na Paywan ku smrrhu ku pyux s'uli taya kya. ays ptyaw sebu Dawu ays psgayun 5 ru 10 alang. 10 alang hani ga, Pangwi , Qaljapang , Ru ja qas , Pacavalj , Ku shu shu , Qu chn.la love vn , Tjacupu , Tjukuvulj , Seqeciin , Seqalapit .
S.PHON: *awu mki s~ɕku taituŋ. s~ɕuʔunun kwara ɣlaβaŋ liŋaj ʔkijan ɣa **.** km* (rħjan rinpaŋ ɣlaβaŋ liŋaj ʔkijan ɣa *.* km*, rrʔan ħjan ɣlaβaŋ liŋaj ʔkijan ɣa **.** km*), *,*** ħi ku s~ɕuʔunun kwara alaŋ ħi kja, *,*** βuwan ku kwarakja, tiku s~ɕaħuj na alaŋ ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *,*** ħi, kjala kwara pins~ɕpuŋ s~ɕʔuli ɣa **%. kwara s~ɕaħuj na alaŋ ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa tajwaŋ ɣjenʦ~ʨumin na pajwan ku s~ɕmrrħu ku pjux s~ɕʔuli taja kja. ajs~ɕ ptjaw s~ɕeβu *awu ajs~ɕ ps~ɕɣajun * ru ** alaŋ. ** alaŋ ħani ɣa, paŋwi , qaljapaŋ , ru ja qas~ɕ , paʦ~ʨa*alj , ku s~ɕħu s~ɕħu , qu ʦ~ʨħn.la lo*e *n , tjaʦ~ʨupu , tjuku*ulj , s~ɕeqeʦ~ʨiin , s~ɕeqalapit .
